subject: New Opening: .NET Developer – .NET
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Wavemedia
ROLE: Lead .NET Developer
START: 2022-04-15
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / on-site
RATE: 1075 SEK/h

The team works primarily with .NET, Docker and SQS.

Key requirements:

  • .NET
  • Docker
  • SQS

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Niklas Persson
Country Manager
Nexum Consulting
Tel: +46 70 012 34 56
